title: Book Edit: Vanilla book editor
description: A spigot plugin that allows a player to add colors and effects to texts in books in vanilla
body:
By using this plugin you can allow players on your server to use colors and styles when writing books without the need for commands.

![A book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20f1c969f84edbe0ad43a02cd07fdb8ad142f09e.png)

Players will also be able to make they're book anonymous and/or tattered in vanilla without commands.

![An anonymous and tattered book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a86279bec068e67d4fe3b1b006088bca3983c016.png)

# Usage:

To add colors or styles to a part of text add the "tag" matching the effect you want(you can see them by using the command **/book help**)

EXAMPLE: <cr> Text

After you press "done" and re-open the book the color or style will be applied.

If you want to stop the color of style from effecting more words then you need, use the tag : <r>



To make the book tattered use the command: **/book tattered**
To make the author of the book anonymous use: **/book anonymous**
